mapper.select: SELECT CAL_NO "calNo", EMP_ID "empId", CAL_TTL "calTtl", CAL_CN "calCn", TO_CHAR(CAL_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') "calBgngDt", CASE WHEN CAL_ALLDAY = 'Y' THEN TO_CHAR(CAL_END_DT + 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE TO_CHAR(CAL_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS "calEndDt", TO_CHAR(CAL_BGNG_TM, 'HH24:MI') "calBgngTm", TO_CHAR(CAL_END_TM, 'HH24:MI') "calEndTm", CAL_COLOR "calColor", CAL_LOCATION "calLocation", CAL_IMPORTANT "calImportant", CAL_SHARE "calShare", CAL_ALLDAY "calAllday", CAL_HOLIDAY_YN "calHolidayYn" FROM CALENDAR WHERE CAL_STTS = 'Y' AND (EMP_ID = #{empId} OR CAL_SHARE = 'Y') ORDER BY CASE WHEN CAL_IMPORTANT = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END ASC, CAL_BGNG_DT ASC

SELECT A.CAL_NO, A.EMP_ID, A.CAL_TTL, A.CAL_CN, TO_CHAR(A.CAL_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CAL_BGNG_DT, TO_CHAR(A.CAL_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CAL_END_DT, A.CAL_COLOR, A.FILE_ID, A.CAL_DT, CAL_UPDATE, A.CAL_IMPORTANT, A.CAL_LOCATION, A.CAL_STTS, A.CAL_BGNG_TM, A.CAL_END_TM, A.CAL_SHARE, A.CAL_ALLDAY, B.CAL_SHARE_ID, B.CAL_SHARE_NM, B.CAL_SHARE_DEPT_NM, E.EMP_NM, D.DEPT_NM FROM CALENDAR A LEFT OUTER JOIN CALENDAR_SHARE B ON (A.CAL_NO = B.CAL_SHARE_NO) LEFT OUTER JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON (B.CAL_SHARE_ID = E.EMP_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD) WHERE A.CAL_NO = #{calNo}
SELECT FILE_DTL_ID, FILE_ID, FILE_DTL_PATH, FILE_DTL_SAVE_NM, FILE_DTL_O_NM, FILE_DTL_EXT, FILE_DTL_DT, EMP_ID, FILE_DTL_DEL_YN FROM FILE_DETAIL WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CAL_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CALENDAR (CAL_NO, EMP_ID, CAL_TTL, CAL_CN, CAL_BGNG_DT, CAL_END_DT, CAL_COLOR, FILE_ID, CAL_DT, CAL_IMPORTANT, CAL_LOCATION, CAL_STTS, CAL_BGNG_TM, CAL_END_TM, CAL_SHARE, CAL_ALLDAY, CAL_HOLIDAY_YN) VALUES (#{calNo}, #{empId}, #{calTtl}, #{calCn}, TO_DATE(#{calBgngDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{calEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{calColor}, #{fileId}, SYSDATE, #{calImportant}, #{calLocation}, #{calStts}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{calBgngTm}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_TIMESTAMP(#{calEndTm}, 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS'), #{calShare}, #{calAllday}, #{calHolidayYn})
mapper.select: SELECT D.DEPT_CD, D.DEPT_NM FROM DEPARTMENT D JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON D.DEPT_CD = E.DEPT_CD WHERE E.EMP_ID = #{empId}
SELECT EMP_ID, EMP_NM, EMP_JBGD, DEPT_CD FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd} AND EMP_ROLE = '사원' ORDER BY EMP_JBGD DESC
SELECT ATT_TYPE_ID, EMP_ID, VCT_DOC_CD, VCT_DOC_BGNG, VCT_DOC_END, VCT_DOC_RSN, VCT_APRV_YN, VCT_STTS FROM APRV_VCT_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND VCT_STTS = '결재완료'

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(VCT_DOC_BGNG, 'YYYY-MM') = #{currentMonth} THEN (VCT_DOC_END - VCT_DOC_BGNG) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS monthCount, NVL(SUM(VCT_DOC_END - VCT_DOC_BGNG +1), 0) AS totalCount, 15 AS maxLeave FROM APRV_VCT_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND VCT_STTS = '결재완료'
SELECT ATT_TYPE_ID, EMP_ID, BZTRP_PLC, BZTRP_START, BZTRP_END, BZTRP_RSN, BZTRP_APRV_YN, BZTRP_STTS FROM APRV_BZTRP_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND BZTRP_STTS = '결재완료'

SELECT NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(BZTRP_START, 'YYYY-MM') = #{currentMonth} THEN (BZTRP_END - BZTRP_START + 1) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS monthCount, NVL(SUM(BZTRP_END - BZTRP_START +1), 0) AS totalCount FROM APRV_BZTRP_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND BZTRP_STTS = '결재완료'

SELECT R.RM_RSVT_NO AS resId, '[' || M.RM_NM || '] ' || R.RM_RSVT_EXPLN AS title, TO_CHAR(R.RM_RSVT_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS bgngDt, TO_CHAR(R.RM_RSVT_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS') AS endDt, R.EMP_ID AS empId, '#566a7f' AS calColor, 'ROOM' AS type FROM ROOM_RESERVATION R INNER JOIN MEETING_ROOM M ON(R.RM_NO = M.RM_NO) WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}

SELECT A.PROJ_NO, A.EMP_ID, A.PROJ_TTL, A.PROJ_BGNG_DT, A.PROJ_END_DT, A.PROJ_STTS, A.PROJ_DTL, A.PROJ_NM, B.PRTPNT_NM, B.PRTPNT_PROJ_IPT FROM PROJECT A JOIN PROJECT_PARTICIPANT B ON (A.PROJ_NO = B.PROJ_NO) WHERE B.EMP_ID = #{empId} ORDER BY A.PROJ_BGNG_DT ASC

SELECT CAL_NO "calNo", EMP_ID "empId", CAL_TTL "calTtl", TO_CHAR(CAL_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') "calBgngDt", CASE WHEN CAL_ALLDAY = 'Y' THEN TO_CHAR(CAL_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ELSE TO_CHAR(CAL_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS "calEndDt", CAL_SHARE "calShare", CAL_ALLDAY "calAllday", CAL_HOLIDAY_YN "calHolidayYn" FROM CALENDAR WHERE CAL_STTS = 'Y' AND (EMP_ID = #{empId} OR CAL_SHARE = 'Y' OR CAL_HOLIDAY_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY CAL_BGNG_DT ASC, CAL_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE CALENDAR SET CAL_TTL = #{calTtl}, CAL_BGNG_DT = TO_DATE(#{calBgngDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), CAL_END_DT = TO_DATE(#{calEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), CAL_UPDATE = SYSDATE, CAL_SHARE = #{calShare}, CAL_ALLDAY = #{calAllday}, CAL_HOLIDAY_YN = #{calHolidayYn} WHERE CAL_NO = #{calNo}
